title: Cross-linking of IgG to Protein A or G Beads
author: New England Biolabs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bhkwj4xe

steps.title: The IgG immobilization protocol is for...
steps.instruction: The IgG immobilization protocol is for the binding of 20 µg, purified IgG or isolation of 20 µg, IgG from serum . Vortex and thoroughly resuspend Protein A Magnetic Beads.

steps.title: Aliquot 100 µL, bead suspension to a sterile microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Aliquot 100 µL, bead suspension to a sterile microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, 0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/2)

steps.title: Repeat wash
steps.instruction: Repeat wash: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/2)

steps.title: Add to the beads 80 µL, 0
steps.instruction: Add to the beads 80 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) .

steps.title: Add 15 µL - 25 µL,...
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL - 25 µL, serum OR 20 µg, purified IgG in a maximum volume of 30 µL .

steps.title: Mix thoroughly and incubate at 4...
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly and incubate at 4 °C with agitation for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Apply magnet and remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Apply magnet and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Add 500 µL, 0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/3)

steps.title: Add 500 µL, 0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/3)

steps.title: Add 500 µL, 0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL, 0.1 M NaPhosphate Buffer (pH 8.0) and vortex to resuspend. Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 3/3)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0.2 M triethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) to the Protein A/G immobilized antibody.(Wash 1/2) At this point the purified IgG can be eluted from the beads or used directly for immunoprecipitation of target proteins. The purified IgG can also be cross-linked to the Protein A beads (see cross-linking protocol) to create a reusable immunoprecipitation bead which prevents the co-elution of antibody with target protein.

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 1/2)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/2)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer (0.2 M triethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) to the Protein A/G immobilized antibody.(Wash 2/2)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 2/2)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/2)

steps.title: Resuspend in 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 1 mL, Cross-linking Buffer containing 25 millimolar (mM), DMP (6.5 mg DMP/ml of buffer) .

steps.title: Mix thoroughly and incubate at Room...
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly and incubate at Room temperature for 00:45:00 with agitation.

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer (0
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer (0.1 M ethanolamine, [pH 8.2]) .

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend.

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Blocking Buffer .

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend.

steps.title: Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature with agitation
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature with agitation.

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, PBS
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 1/3)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 1/3)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 1/3)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, PBS
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 2/3)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 2/3)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 2/3)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, PBS
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, PBS . (Wash 3/3)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (Wash 3/3)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (Wash 3/3)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Elution Buffer (0
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Elution Buffer (0.1 M glycine-HCl [pH 2.5]) .

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend.

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. This elutes bound antibody that is not cross-linked with DMP.

steps.title: Resuspend and store beads in 100 µL, PBS , 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend and store beads in 100 µL, PBS , 0.1% Tween 20, 0.02% sodium azide.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, PBS
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, PBS . (1/2)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (1/2)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (1/2)

steps.title: Add 1 mL, PBS
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, PBS . (2/2)

steps.title: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 00:00:30 , to pull beads to the side of the tube and remove supernatant. (2/2)

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend. (2/2)
